title: 7. **OpenClaw Agent Services**
summary:
What it is: Offer customized OpenClaw agent stack services to small businesses, including setup, training, and maintenance for their specific needs.
Revenue model: One-time setup fees plus ongoing retainer fees for support and updates.
Time to first dollar: 2-4 weeks.
First action: Develop a service brochure highlighting the benefits and applications of the OpenClaw agent stack for small businesses.
Risk/blocker: Finding initial clients and demonstrating the value proposition of the OpenClaw ser
